summary: Report the per-band frequency energy (sum of squares) of an Image/Field1 under a Laplacian or Gaussian decomposition, optionally windowed by a mask. The texture-preservation measurement assert.frequency_preserved compares.

inputs.name: resource
inputs.doc: The Image or Field1 whose per-band energy is reported.

inputs.name: mask
inputs.doc: An optional coverage mask: energy is computed over the masked region (unmasked base pixels are zeroed before decomposition).

params.name: bands
params.doc: The number of bands (= pyramid levels), finest first.

params.name: decomposition
params.doc: The decomposition to report over (band-pass vs per-level low-pass).

params.name: phase
params.doc: The odd-size rounding rule for the pyramid level extents.
